entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing climate-related data to help farmers build resilience and improve livelihoods

entities.name: FARMER'S RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of farmers to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: DRYLAND REGIONS
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid environments characterized by low rainfall, such as the West Africa Sahel

entities.name: WEST AFRICA SAHEL
entities.description: A biogeographic zone of transition in West Africa encompassing countries like Mali and Niger

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the effectiveness of climate information services was evaluated

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the effectiveness of climate information services was evaluated

entities.name: CLIMATE FORECASTS
entities.description: Predictions of future climate conditions, including seasonal and daily forecasts

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC BENEFITS
entities.description: Positive impacts on the financial and social well-being of farmers resulting from climate information

entities.name: ALERTS
entities.description: Warnings about imminent weather events delivered to farmers

entities.name: SMS SANDJI PLATFORM
entities.description: A digital platform used in Mali to deliver climate information and alerts

entities.name: NATIONAL METEOROLOGICAL AGENCY ALERT DATABASE
entities.description: A database used in Niger to manage and track climate alerts

entities.name: CSI
entities.description: Critical Success Index used to measure the accuracy of climate forecasts

entities.name: BS INDEX
entities.description: Brier Score used to measure the accuracy of climate forecasts

entities.name: FIELD SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method involving a sample of 900 individuals in Niger and 227 in Mali

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Analysis of Variance used to determine the statistical significance of climate information utilization on income

entities.name: FINANCIAL INCOMES
entities.description: The monetary gain per hectare for farmers, which improved through the use of climate information

entities.name: TIME-SAVING
entities.description: The reduction in labor hours per hectare achieved by utilizing climate information

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD OF FARMERS
entities.description: The overall means of securing basic necessities and economic stability for farmers
